name: codex-rnd-daemon
description: Experimental local daemon that uses a GitHub Project board as a queue for Codex CLI R&D work.

scripts.check: node --check tools/codex-daemon/index.mjs && node --check tools/codex-daemon/github.mjs && node --check tools/codex-daemon/state.mjs && node --check tools/codex-daemon/prompts.mjs && node --check tools/codex-daemon/codex-runner.mjs && node --check tools/codex-daemon/packet.mjs
